meta.title: B2 Review
meta.description: A comprehensive review of all B2 grammar, vocabulary, and discourse features.
meta.description_ko: B2 전체 문법, 어휘, 담화 특징 종합 복습.

explanation.en: Third conditional: If + past perfect, would have + past participle.
explanation.ko: 3형 조건문: If + 과거완료, would have + 과거분사.

questions.prompt: 올바른 3형 조건문은? (U01)
choices: If she had called, I answered.
If she would have called, I'd have answered.
If she had called, I would have answered.
If she called, I would have answered.

explanation.en: 'Never' at the start triggers inversion: 'Never have I seen'.
explanation.ko: 'never'가 문두에 오면 도치 발생: 'Never have I seen'.

questions.prompt: Never _____ such a talented musician perform live. (U02)

explanation.en: 'Is believed to have + past participle' = passive reporting structure.
explanation.ko: 'is believed to have + 과거분사' = 수동 보고 구조.

questions.prompt: 'The company is believed to have made losses.' — 이 구조는? (U03)

explanation.en: 'Wish + past perfect' = regret about something that didn't happen in the past.
explanation.ko: 'wish + 과거완료' = 과거에 일어나지 않은 일에 대한 후회.

questions.prompt: I wish I _____ more time to travel when I was younger. (U04)

explanation.en: Past participle clause 'Exhausted by' = expressing reason/circumstance.
explanation.ko: 과거분사절 'Exhausted by' = 이유/상황 표현.

questions.prompt: 'Exhausted by the journey, she fell asleep immediately.' — 분사절의 역할은? (U05)

explanation.en: 'Shed light on' = clarify or illuminate something previously unclear.
explanation.ko: 'shed light on' = 이전에 불명확했던 것을 명확히 하다.

questions.prompt: The discovery _____ light on the previously unknown aspects of the disease. (U06)

explanation.en: 'The government's decision to raise taxes' = nominalised form of 'The government decided to raise taxes'.
explanation.ko: 'The government's decision to raise taxes' = 명사화된 형태.

questions.prompt: 'The government's decision to raise taxes' — 이 구조의 이름은? (U07)

explanation.en: 'Profound implications' = deep and far-reaching consequences.
explanation.ko: 'profound implications' = 깊고 광범위한 결과.

questions.prompt: The results have _____ implications for our understanding of the disease. (U08/U11)

explanation.en: 'Imply' (text) vs 'infer' (reader). A text implies; readers infer.
explanation.ko: 'imply'(텍스트) vs 'infer'(독자).

questions.prompt: 텍스트에서 'The text infers X'는 왜 틀린가요? (U09)

explanation.en: 'Admittedly ... but' = concession structure in argumentation.
explanation.ko: 'Admittedly ... but' = 논증의 양보 구조.

questions.prompt: 'Admittedly, there are counterarguments, _____ the evidence in favour is overwhelming.' (U10)

explanation.en: 'Ubiquitous' = seeming to be everywhere at the same time.
explanation.ko: 'ubiquitous' = 어디에나 있는 것처럼 보이는.

questions.prompt: 'ubiquitous'의 뜻은? (U11)

explanation.en: 'Reach consensus' = come to a shared agreement.
explanation.ko: 'reach consensus' = 공유된 합의에 도달하다.

questions.prompt: The two nations failed to reach _____ on the terms of the agreement. (U12)

explanation.en: Kant's categorical imperative = act only according to principles you'd want to be universal laws.
explanation.ko: 칸트의 정언 명령 = 모든 사람이 따르기를 원하는 원칙에 따라서만 행동하라.

questions.prompt: 칸트의 '정언 명령'의 핵심 원칙은? (U13)
choices: 모든 사람이 따르기를 원하는 원칙에 따라서만 행동하라

explanation.en: 'Confirmation bias' = seeking information that confirms what you already believe.
explanation.ko: 'confirmation bias' = 이미 믿는 것을 확인하는 정보를 찾는 경향.

questions.prompt: 'Confirmation _____ leads people to seek information that confirms their existing beliefs.' (U14)

explanation.en: Fiscal = government spending/tax. Monetary = central bank interest rates/money supply.
explanation.ko: fiscal = 정부 지출/세금. monetary = 중앙은행 금리/화폐 공급.

questions.prompt: 'Fiscal policy'와 'monetary policy'의 차이는? (U15)
choices: fiscal = 정부 지출/세금, monetary = 금리/화폐 공급
fiscal = 금리 정책, monetary = 정부 지출

explanation.en: 'Unreliable narrator' = one whose account cannot be fully trusted.
explanation.ko: 'unreliable narrator' = 완전히 신뢰할 수 없는 화자.

questions.prompt: The novel's use of an _____ narrator creates ambiguity about what actually happened. (U16)

explanation.en: 'Will have been + verb-ing' = future perfect continuous — duration up to a future point.
explanation.ko: 'will have been + 동사-ing' = 미래 완료 진행형.

questions.prompt: 'By next year, she will have been working here for a decade.' — 이 시제는? (U17)

explanation.en: 'I would be grateful if' = highly formal request structure.
explanation.ko: 'I would be grateful if' = 매우 격식체 요청 구조.

questions.prompt: In formal correspondence, 'I would be grateful if you could...' is more _____ than 'Can you please...'

explanation.en: Spoken English uses more fillers, contractions, phrasal verbs; written is more formal and structured.
explanation.ko: 구어체 영어는 채움말, 축약형, 구동사를 더 많이 사용합니다.

questions.prompt: 구어체와 문어체의 가장 큰 차이 중 하나는? (U19)
choices: 구어체는 더 많은 채움말, 축약형, 구동사를 사용한다

explanation.en: Inverted third conditional: 'Had + subject + past participle' = formal conditional.
explanation.ko: 도치된 3형 조건문: 격식체 조건문.

questions.prompt: 다음 단어를 올바른 순서로 배열하세요.
questions.answer: Had the government acted sooner, the crisis might have been averted.

explanation.en: 'Rise of social media' (not 'raise'). 'Rise' = increase; 'raise' = lift deliberately.
explanation.ko: 'rise of social media'('raise'가 아닌). 'rise' = 올라가다; 'raise' = 의도적으로 올리다.

questions.prompt: 틀린 부분을 찾으세요: 'The raise of social media has transformed communication.'
choices: of social media → in social media

explanation.en: 'It is widely argued that' = passive reporting structure with adverb modifier.
explanation.ko: 'It is widely argued that' = 부사 수식어가 있는 수동 보고 구조.

questions.prompt: It is _____ argued that economic growth alone cannot solve social inequality.

explanation.en: First conditional is B1 level. The others (3rd conditional, inversion, participle clauses) are B2.
explanation.ko: 1형 조건문은 B1 수준입니다. 나머지(3형 조건문, 도치, 분사절)는 B2.

questions.prompt: 다음 중 B2 수준 문법이 아닌 것은?

explanation.en: Key B2 grammar structures and their unit locations.
explanation.ko: 주요 B2 문법 구조와 해당 유닛.

questions.prompt: B2 핵심 개념과 관련 유닛을 연결하세요.

explanation.en: 'The premise of the argument' = the fundamental assumption it is built on.
explanation.ko: 'the premise of the argument' = 논거가 기반하는 근본적인 가정.

questions.prompt: The _____ of the argument rests on the assumption that economic growth benefits everyone equally.
